category_sources: Official MLton homepage describes MLton as a whole-program optimizing compiler for Standard ML.
source_facts.description: Whole-program, optimizing compiler for Standard ML.
display_name_sources: Official MLton homepage uses the project name MLton.
docs_sources: Official MLton homepage links to Documentation as the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official MLton Sources page states the project maintains sources with Git at https://github.com/MLton/mlton.git.
tags_sources: Official MLton homepage describes compiler/runtime features for Standard ML.
source_facts.description identifies Standard ML compiler functionality.
